summary: Complete testing of Document Library redesign. All backend tests passed (9/9). All frontend UI tests passed. The page implements two modes: GENERATE mode (default) with Archer chat interface, category cards, suggestion chips, and BROWSE mode with 143 templates (note: UI shows '158' but actual count is 143), filter pills, search bar, and 2-column grid layout.

issues: Template count shows '158' in UI but actual template count is 143. The CATS array counts (22+18+8+20+10+12+10+12=112) plus additional categories (realestate:10, ip:8, court:8, immigration:5=31) equals 143 total.

1_login_navigate_documents.evidence: Login with test@archer.legal / ArcherPro2026! successful, navigated to /documents

2_generate_mode_default.evidence: GENERATE mode is default with Archer identity bar visible, opening message displayed

3_generate_mode_title.evidence: Title 'Generate any document — just describe what you need.' visible

4_archer_strip.evidence: Archer strip shows 'Archer · Senior Legal Advisor', '20 years experience · 847K+ legal sources', 'Available now' status

5_category_cards_grid.evidence: 8 category cards in grid: Employment (22), Housing (18), NDA (8), Business (20), Debt & Finance (10), Family (12), Freelance (10), Consumer (12)

6_left_sidebar.evidence: Sidebar contains: Archer logo, Generate/Browse mode toggle buttons, 158 count pill, Recent documents section

7_suggestion_chips.evidence: 4 suggestion chips visible: 'I need an NDA', 'Create a lease agreement', 'Draft a freelance contract', 'Write a demand letter'

8_chat_input.evidence: Text input with placeholder 'Describe the document you need...' and send button visible

9_category_card_click.evidence: Clicking Employment category card sends 'I need a employment document' to Archer chat, Archer responds with questions

10_suggestion_chip_click.evidence: Clicking 'I need an NDA' chip sends message to Archer, Archer responds with NDA-related questions

11_manual_message_enter.evidence: Typing message and pressing Enter sends message, appears as user bubble, Archer responds

12_browse_mode_switch.evidence: Clicking Browse button switches to BROWSE mode with '158 document templates' title

13_browse_search_bar.evidence: Search bar visible with 'Search templates...' placeholder

14_browse_filter_pills.evidence: 13 filter pills: All, Employment, Housing, NDA, Business, Freelance, Consumer, Debt, Family, Real Estate, IP, Court, Immigration

15_browse_template_grid.evidence: 2-column template grid with template names, descriptions, and category icons

16_filter_pill_click.evidence: Clicking Housing filter shows only 18 housing templates

17_search_filter.evidence: Typing 'lease' in search bar filters to 8 templates containing 'lease'

18_template_card_click.evidence: Clicking template card switches to GENERATE mode with input pre-filled 'I need a Employment Contract Full-Time'

19_generate_hover_effect.evidence: 'Generate →' text appears on template card hover (opacity changes from 0 to 1)

20_mode_persistence.evidence: Browse mode persists after page refresh (localStorage 'archer_doc_mode' working)

21_new_document_button.evidence: '+ New document' button appears after starting conversation, clicking resets conversation

22_backend_archer_send.evidence: POST /api/documents/archer/send works, creates conversation, returns Archer response

26_backend_auth_required.evidence: All Archer endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests

action_items: MINOR: Update template count from '158' to '143' in UI (Browse button pill and title) to match actual template count
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentLibrary.js implements clean 2-column layout with CSS grid (220px sidebar + 1fr main)
Mode toggle uses localStorage for persistence - good UX pattern
ALL_TEMPLATES array contains 143 templates but UI displays '158' - minor discrepancy
Archer chat integration uses /api/documents/archer/send endpoint correctly
Filter pills and search work client-side for fast filtering
Template card hover effect uses CSS transition for smooth 'Generate →' reveal
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Library redesign fully tested. Two modes work correctly: GENERATE mode (default) with Archer chat for document creation, BROWSE mode with 143 templates across 13 categories. All backend Archer document creator APIs working. Minor issue: UI shows '158 templates' but actual count is 143. Mode persistence via localStorage works. Template click pre-fills input and switches to generate mode.
